tagline: OpenClaw is a personal AI assistant you run on your own devices
description:
OpenClaw is an open-source personal AI assistant designed to extend the capabilities of large language models (LLMs) into intelligent agents that actively execute tasks, interact across multiple platforms, and operate continuously. It supports 24/7 operation on the user's own device or server and provides intelligent automation services through common communication tools. OpenClaw connects AI to existing chat channels (such as WhatsApp, Telegram, Discord, etc.) via a locally running "gateway + agent" architecture, enabling it not only to answer questions but also to proactively perform actions, manage schedules, process emails, automate workflows, and more.

**Key Features**:

- Multi-channel Communication Integration: Interact directly with AI through common communication platforms like WhatsApp, Telegram, Slack, Discord, Signal, iMessage, Microsoft Teams, etc., without the need for additional applications.

- Continuous Online & Long-term Memory: OpenClaw can run 24/7, possessing persistent memory and context retention capabilities, allowing it to remember preferences, historical conversations, and provide personalized services.

- Real Action Execution: Beyond text replies, it can perform system tasks (e.g., clear inbox, send emails, fill forms, schedule appointments, browse web, control browser, etc.).

- Skill Expansion & Automated Workflows: Supports community plugins, extended skills, and custom automation scripts, enabling the AI to execute complex tasks in various scenarios.

**Learn More:**

- [Official Website](https://openclaw.ai)

- [Official Documentation](https://docs.openclaw.ai/)

- [OpenClaw GitHub Repository](https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw)

- [Configure Guide](https://www.zimaspace.com/docs/zimaos/How-to-Deploy-OpenClaw)
author: openclaw

tips.before_install: Before use, please follow the [Configuration Guide](https://www.zimaspace.com/docs/zimaos/How-to-Deploy-OpenClaw) to configure the model and related settings.

releaseNotes.en_US:
- OpenClaw 2026.5.7 improves release and plugin publishing recovery around transient ClawHub CLI dependency installation failures.
- Adds an explicit openai/chat-latest direct API-key model override and exposes computed cron status in JSON output.
- Hardens native command ownership, memory admin checks, inline skill tool authorization, credential resolution, and plugin lifecycle shell handling.
releaseNotes.en_GB:
- OpenClaw 2026.5.7 improves release and plugin publishing recovery around transient ClawHub CLI dependency installation failures.
- Adds an explicit openai/chat-latest direct API-key model override and exposes computed cron status in JSON output.
- Hardens native command ownership, memory admin checks, inline skill tool authorization, credential resolution, and plugin lifecycle shell handling.
releaseNotes.it_IT:
- OpenClaw 2026.5.7 migliora il ripristino della pubblicazione del rilascio e del plug-in in caso di errori di installazione delle dipendenze transitorie ClawHub CLI.
- Aggiunge un override esplicito del modello openai/chat-latest diretto API-key ed espone lo stato cron calcolato nell'output JSON.
- Rafforza la proprietà dei comandi nativi, i controlli di amministrazione della memoria, l'autorizzazione degli strumenti di abilità in linea, la risoluzione delle credenziali e la gestione della shell del ciclo di vita dei plug-in.
releaseNotes.nb_NO:
- OpenClaw 2026.5.7 forbedrer utgivelses- og pluginpubliseringsgjenoppretting rundt forbigående ClawHub CLI avhengighetsinstallasjonsfeil.
- Legger til en eksplisitt openai/chat-latest direkte API-key modelloverstyring og avslører beregnet cron-status i JSON-utdata.
- Hardner innfødt kommandoeierskap, minneadministratorsjekker, innebygd ferdighetsverktøyautorisasjon, legitimasjonsoppløsning og plugin-livssyklus-skallhåndtering.
releaseNotes.zh_CN:
- OpenClaw 2026.5.7 改进了 transient ClawHub CLI dependency installation failures 场景下的 release 和 plugin publishing recovery。
- 新增显式 openai/chat-latest direct API-key model override，并在 JSON output 中暴露 computed cron status。
- 加固了 native command ownership、memory admin checks、inline skill tool authorization、credential resolution 和 plugin lifecycle shell handling。
releaseNotes.ja_JP:
- OpenClaw 2026.5.7 は transient ClawHub CLI dependency installation failures まわりの release と plugin publishing recovery を改善します。
- 明示的な openai/chat-latest direct API-key model override を追加し、JSON output に computed cron status を公開します。
- native command ownership、memory admin checks、inline skill tool authorization、credential resolution、plugin lifecycle shell handling が強化されました。
releaseNotes.ko_KR:
- OpenClaw 2026.5.7은 transient ClawHub CLI dependency installation failures 상황에서 release 및 plugin publishing recovery를 개선합니다.
- 명시적인 openai/chat-latest direct API-key model override를 추가하고 JSON output에 computed cron status를 노출합니다.
- native command ownership, memory admin checks, inline skill tool authorization, credential resolution, plugin lifecycle shell handling을 강화했습니다.
releaseNotes.fr_FR:
- OpenClaw 2026.5.7 ameliore release et plugin publishing recovery en cas de transient ClawHub CLI dependency installation failures.
- Un openai/chat-latest direct API-key model override explicite a ete ajoute et computed cron status est expose dans JSON output.
- Native command ownership, memory admin checks, inline skill tool authorization, credential resolution et plugin lifecycle shell handling ont ete renforces.
releaseNotes.de_DE:
- OpenClaw 2026.5.7 verbessert release und plugin publishing recovery bei transient ClawHub CLI dependency installation failures.
- Ein expliziter openai/chat-latest direct API-key model override wurde hinzugefuegt, und computed cron status wird in JSON output ausgegeben.
- Gehaertet wurden native command ownership, memory admin checks, inline skill tool authorization, credential resolution und plugin lifecycle shell handling.
releaseNotes.sv_SE:
- OpenClaw 2026.5.7 förbättrar release- och plugin-publiceringsåterställning kring tillfälliga ClawHub CLI-beroendeinstallationsfel.
- Lägger till en explicit openai/chat-latest direkt API-key modell åsidosättande och exponerar beräknad cron status i JSON utdata.
- Förstärker inbyggt kommandoägande, minnesadministratörskontroller, auktorisering av inline-färdighetsverktyg, autentiseringsupplösning och plugin-livscykelhantering.
releaseNotes.el_GR:
- Το OpenClaw 2026.5.7 βελτιώνει την ανάκτηση έκδοσης και δημοσίευσης προσθηκών σχετικά με παροδικές αποτυχίες εγκατάστασης εξάρτησης ClawHub CLI.
- Προσθέτει μια ρητή openai/chat-latest άμεση παράκαμψη μοντέλου API-key και εκθέτει την υπολογισμένη κατάσταση cron στην έξοδο JSON.
- Σκληραίνει την ιδιοκτησία εγγενών εντολών, τους ελέγχους διαχειριστή μνήμης, την εξουσιοδότηση εργαλείου ενσωματωμένης ικανότητας, την ανάλυση διαπιστευτηρίων και τον χειρισμό του κελύφους του κύκλου ζωής των προσθηκών.
releaseNotes.hr_HR:
- OpenClaw 2026.5.7 poboljšava izdanje i oporavak objavljivanja dodataka oko prolaznih ClawHub CLI instalacijskih grešaka ovisnosti.
- Dodaje eksplicitno nadjačavanje openai/chat-latest izravnog API-key modela i izlaže izračunati cron status u JSON izlazu.
- Ojačava izvorno vlasništvo naredbi, provjere administratora memorije, autorizaciju ugrađenog alata za vještine, razlučivanje vjerodajnica i rukovanje ljuskom životnog ciklusa dodatka.
releaseNotes.pt_PT:
- OpenClaw 2026.5.7 melhora a recuperação de lançamento e publicação de plug-ins em torno de falhas transitórias de instalação de dependências ClawHub CLI.
- Adiciona uma substituição explícita do modelo openai/chat-latest direto API-key e expõe o estado do cron computado na saída JSON.
- Reforça a propriedade de comandos nativos, verificações de administração de memória, autorização de ferramentas de competências em linha, resolução de credenciais e manipulação de shell do ciclo de vida do plug-in.
releaseNotes.ru_RU:
- OpenClaw 2026.5.7 улучшает восстановление выпуска и публикации плагинов при временных сбоях установки зависимостей ClawHub CLI.
- Добавляет явное прямое переопределение модели API-key openai/chat-latest и отображает вычисленный статус cron в выходных данных JSON.
- Усиливает владение собственными командами, проверки администратора памяти, авторизацию встроенных инструментов навыков, разрешение учетных данных и обработку оболочки жизненного цикла плагина.
releaseNotes.tr_TR:
- OpenClaw 2026.5.7, geçici ClawHub CLI bağımlılık yükleme hataları etrafında sürüm ve eklenti yayınlama kurtarmasını iyileştirir.
- Açık bir openai/chat-latest doğrudan API-key modeli geçersiz kılma ekler ve JSON çıktısında hesaplanan cron durumunu gösterir.
- Yerel komut sahipliğini, bellek yöneticisi kontrollerini, satır içi beceri aracı yetkilendirmesini, kimlik bilgisi çözümlemesini ve eklenti yaşam döngüsü kabuk işlemeyi güçlendirir.

title: OpenClaw
